Resolves #15217

Syncs `ROADMAP.md` to the four operator scope rulings from the 2026-07-16 live session (recorded on the scope ledger D#15209): the v13.3 deferred line no longer names #14570 (pulled into v13.2 as Golden Path 2 work — the ledger carries the ruling provenance; #14569 and every other deferred entry stay verbatim), and the session-intake paragraph now routes contributors to the living scope ledger alongside D#14561 and milestone #9. No other content changes — the diff is exactly the two ruled edits, no re-planning.

Evidence: L1 (docs-only — no runtime surface; the diff IS the deliverable) → L1 required (both ACs are static text assertions). No residuals.

None substantive.

- Source + PR-body gates: `npm run agent-preflight -- --no-fix ROADMAP.md --pr-body <this draft>` — passed before commit.
